not_used_for_coverage.reason: Its DUT is axi_dma_rd. The requested RTL case1.v is not instantiated in axi_dma_rd.v.

vcs_json_input_support.mechanism: cocotb reads constraints.json, generates AXI read operations, drives case1 through VPI, and VCS collects RTL coverage with -cm line+branch.
vcs_json_input_support.important_detail: VCS does not directly parse the JSON; the Python testbench consumes it.

public_dataset_run.command_shape: CASE1_CONSTRAINT_JSON=constraints.json make SIM=vcs MODULE=test_case1_json_sequences TESTCASE=run_json_sequences EXTRA_ARGS="-cm line+branch" COMPILE_ARGS="-cm_dir coverage.vdb" SIM_ARGS="-cm_dir sim_build/coverage.vdb"

scoreboard.reference_model: AxiRamRead memory model on m_axi plus byte-for-byte comparison at s_axi
scoreboard.write_update_rule: each generated read fills the downstream RAM at the selected address with expected bytes before issuing AR
scoreboard.read_compare_rule: AxiMasterRead result data must equal the expected byte sequence for every generated read
scoreboard.response_rule: read responses must complete without cocotbext-axi protocol errors
